chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-214 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 24-10-2023 Mr. Ashok Kumar K. Jmaba, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G a/w Muhammad Akram, Mukhtiarkar, Khairpur. ***** Learned AAG and Mukhtiarkar, Khairpur submit that they are ready to comply with order dated 01.04.2021, whereby the Survey Superintendent, Khairpur was directed to carry out demarcation of the land of the petitioner within three weeks subject to payment of requisite fee amounting to Rs.2,22,000/-. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that if the Challan of the said amount is issued to him, he would deposit the same in the National Bank in accordance with law. Mukhtiarkar, undertakes that within one week, Challan would be issued to the petitioner and this exercise will be completed within a period of two months. Accordingly, in view of the above, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
